focus: Belgium tax-benefit surface with federal, Brussels, Flemish, Walloon, and community-layer coverage

national.description: Federal/national Belgium statutes, regulations, and agency policy surfaces.

regional.description: Brussels-Capital Region and Common Community Commission surfaces.
Flemish Region and Flemish Community surfaces where competence is integrated in Flemish institutions.

community.description: German-speaking Community surfaces promoted after Moniteur/ELI source discovery.
French Community, COCOF, VGC, and COCOM namespaces are added when source manifests promote those competences.

status_terms.not_started: No Axiom corpus or RuleSpec artifact exists yet.
status_terms.source_spine: Official source family identified and ready for corpus ingestion.
status_terms.source_ids_seeded: Official ELI or publication identifiers are identified for first ingestion.
status_terms.corpus_ingested: Official source snapshots, inventories, provisions, and coverage were generated in axiom-corpus.
status_terms.oracle_identified: At least one executable household-level comparison oracle is identified but not necessarily pinned.
status_terms.ready_for_ingest: Official source URLs and target provision families are identified.
status_terms.oracle_parity: Axiom outputs are compared against at least one pinned comparison oracle.

tracks.title: Personal income tax
official_source_families: Code des impots sur les revenus 1992
Arrete royal d'execution du Code des impots sur les revenus 1992
annual tax amendment laws
SPF Finances rate guidance
components: professional, replacement, movable, and immovable income categories
Article 86-89 spouse professional-income attribution and imputation under joint assessment
Article 126/127 joint-assessment gate and income allocation
Article 129 supplied eligible loss-balance transfer bridge
federal progressive tax brackets and rates
communal additional tax interface for Brussels municipalities

tracks.title: Employee, employer, self-employed, and Flemish social protection contributions
official_source_families: Loi du 27 juin 1969 concernant la securite sociale des travailleurs
Arrete royal du 28 novembre 1969
self-employed social status instruments
ONSS administrative instructions
Decreet van 18 mei 2018 houdende de Vlaamse sociale bescherming
Besluit van de Vlaamse Regering van 30 november 2018 houdende de uitvoering van het decreet van 18 mei 2018 houdende de Vlaamse sociale bescherming
components: ordinary Article 38 employee contribution before supplied reductions

tracks.title: Federal guaranteed family benefits
official_source_families: Loi du 20 juillet 1971 instituant des prestations familiales garanties
Arrete royal du 25 octobre 1971 portant execution de la loi du 20 juillet 1971 instituant des prestations familiales garanties
Coordinated family-allowance laws and delegated indexation instruments
components: coordinated-law monthly and grant amount schedules

tracks.title: Brussels family benefits
official_source_families: Ordonnance du 25 avril 2019 reglant l'octroi des prestations familiales
Brussels delegated instruments and rate orders
Famiris rate and eligibility guidance

tracks.title: Flemish family benefits
official_source_families: Decreet van 27 april 2018 tot regeling van de toelagen in het kader van het gezinsbeleid
Flemish delegated instruments and rate orders
Groeipakket rate and eligibility guidance

tracks.title: Walloon family benefits
official_source_families: Decret du 8 fevrier 2018 relatif a la gestion et au paiement des prestations familiales
Walloon delegated instruments and rate orders
AVIQ rate and eligibility guidance

tracks.title: German-speaking Community family benefits
official_source_families: German-speaking Community decree of 23 April 2018 on family benefits
German-speaking Community program decree of 22 December 2025 family-benefit amendments
German-speaking Community delegated instruments and current amount guidance
Ostbelgien Familie rate and eligibility guidance

tracks.title: Right to social integration and minimum income
official_source_families: Loi du 26 mai 2002 concernant le droit a l'integration sociale
Arrete royal du 11 juillet 2002 portant reglement general en matiere de droit a l'integration sociale
Loi organique des CPAS, Brussels form
components: age, residence, nationality, and resource predicates
category rates for cohabitant, single person, and person with family at charge

tracks.title: Unemployment insurance and activation interfaces
official_source_families: Arrete royal du 25 novembre 1991 portant reglementation du chomage
ministerial decrees and ONEM administrative instructions
components: benefit amount by phase and previous wage

tracks.title: Sickness, invalidity, and health insurance indemnities
official_source_families: Loi relative a l'assurance obligatoire soins de sante et indemnites coordonnee le 14 juillet 1994
Arrete royal du 3 juillet 1996 portant execution de la loi relative a l'assurance obligatoire soins de sante et indemnites
INAMI instructions
components: Article 32/86/112/131 holder and continuity status bridge

tracks.title: Disability allowances and regional care-related supports
official_source_families: Loi du 27 fevrier 1987 relative aux allocations aux personnes handicapees
Ordonnance du 10 decembre 2020 relative a l'allocation pour l'aide aux personnes agees
Arrete du College reuni du 28 janvier 2021 portant execution de l'ordonnance du 10 decembre 2020 relative a l'allocation pour l'aide aux personnes agees
Brussels, Flemish, Walloon, and community long-term-care and mobility-support instruments
components: Brussels APA eligibility, household-income/resource test, and annual/monthly award

tracks.title: Pensions and income guarantee for older people
official_source_families: statutory pension laws and implementing decrees
Loi du 22 mars 2001 instituant la garantie de revenus aux personnes agees

tracks.title: Brussels housing assistance
official_source_families: Code bruxellois du Logement
Brussels delegated instruments for rent allowance, social housing, and housing supports
Brussels-Capital Region Government order of 26 September 1996 organizing social-housing rental
components: social housing priority titles and adapted-bedroom matching
social housing annual and monthly rent formula
social housing rent complements and rental guarantee
social, moderate, and medium housing lease-extension interfaces
relocation accompaniment rent intervention and moving grant

tracks.title: Student support and community education grants
official_source_families: community decrees and implementing orders on study grants
Brussels-resident eligibility and mobility interfaces
Flanders, Wallonia, and community-specific student-support instruments
components: French Community, Flemish Community, and German-speaking Community routing

tracks.title: VAT and indirect-tax interfaces
official_source_families: Code de la taxe sur la valeur ajoutee
VAT royal decrees and SPF Finances guidance
federal excise laws and current rate schedules

tracks.title: Regional inheritance tax
official_source_families: Vlaamse Codex Fiscaliteit inheritance-tax provisions
Brussels succession-duty provisions
Walloon succession-duty provisions
components: taxable estate and beneficiary acquisition bases

tracks.title: Regional gift tax
official_source_families: Vlaamse Codex Fiscaliteit gift-tax provisions
Brussels registration-duty provisions
Walloon registration-duty provisions
components: Brussels and Walloon movable-gift donor-death condition or term exclusions

tracks.title: Regional real-property tax and reductions
official_source_families: Vlaamse Codex Fiscaliteit immovable-withholding-tax provisions
Brussels property-tax provisions
Walloon property-tax provisions
components: article-258 designated-dwelling and professional-use apportionment limits
article-259 rent deduction pass-through for family and disability reductions

tracks.title: Brussels circulation tax and tax on entry into service
official_source_families: Brussels ordinances and delegated instruments on vehicle taxation
legacy federal vehicle-tax instruments as regionally applied or amended
Brussels Fiscality or SPF Finance guidance after upstream law identification
components: circulation tax base and rate schedule
tax on entry into service base and rate schedule

tracks.title: Flemish circulation tax and tax on entry into service
official_source_families: Vlaamse Codex Fiscaliteit current article-version text after Moniteur ELI identification
Vlaamse Belastingdienst guidance after upstream law identification
components: annual circulation tax passenger-car rate schedule
BIV formula, age correction, minimum and maximum
regional exemptions and detailed vehicle-class routing

tracks.title: Walloon circulation tax and tax on entry into service
official_source_families: Walloon decrees published in the Moniteur belge
Wallex official Walloon legislation locator
SPW Finances indexed rate tables after upstream law identification
components: tax on entry into service passenger-car formula
annual circulation tax and additional circulation tax
regional exemptions and detailed vehicle-class routing

tracks.title: Residency, nationality, and immigration predicates used by fiscal programs
official_source_families: nationality, residence, and foreigner-status laws
program-specific residence tests
